patch

Update to 1.4.3

Changelog
 - Possible crash when connection to MPD was lost.
 - Settings window could be too small for comfort.
 - Column widths not set in Library and Playlist view.
 - Obsolete email address in 'about'.
 - Option to start player minimized.
 - Minor cosmetic changes.
